title: syntherisma humifusa
intro: Syntherisma humifusa, also known as woolly false heather, is a low-growing, perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, which can aid in preventing infections. In herbal preparations, Syntherisma humifusa is often used in salves, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
